name: 48_Stock_Trading_Simulation_PPO_HistoricalData_RL
query: Habari! Ninavutiwa na kuendeleza wakala wa biashara ya hisa kwa kutumia algoriti ya Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO). Wazo ni kutumia data ya kihistoria ya soko kwa mafunzo na majaribio. Mazingira ya simulizi ya biashara ya hisa yanapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/env.py`. Algoriti ya Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) inapaswa kutekelezwa katika `src/train.py`. Tafadhali hifadhi wakala aliyefunzwa chini ya `models/saved_models/`. Rekodi maamuzi yote ya biashara katika `results/trade_decisions.txt` na hifadhi faida jumla katika `results/metrics/total_profit.txt`. Onyesha mchakato wa faida na uhifadhi kama `results/figures/profit_curve.png`. Tengeneza ripoti inayojumuisha mkakati wa biashara, faida, na uchambuzi wa hatari, na uhifadhi kama `results/trading_strategy_report.md`. Tekeleza zana ya maingiliano kwa kutumia Streamlit katika `src/visualize.py` inayoruhusu watumiaji kujaribu vigezo tofauti na kuendesha simulizi.

requirements.criteria: Mazingira ya simulizi ya biashara ya hisa yanatekelezwa katika `src/env.py`.
Data ya kihistoria ya soko inatumika kwa mafunzo na majaribio.
Algoriti ya "Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)" inatekelezwa katika `src/train.py`.
Maamuzi ya biashara yanarekodiwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/trade_decisions.txt`.
Mchakato wa faida unaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/profit_curve.png`.
Ripoti inayojumuisha mkakati wa biashara, faida, na uchambuzi wa hatari inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/trading_strategy_report.md`.
Zana ya maingiliano inayoruhusu watumiaji kujaribu vigezo tofauti na kuendesha simulizi kwa kutumia "Streamlit" inatekelezwa katika `src/visualize.py`.

preferences.criteria: Uonyeshaji wa mchakato wa faida unapaswa kuonyesha biashara au matukio muhimu ambayo yaliathiri utendaji.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha maarifa juu ya jinsi urekebishaji wa vigezo unavyoathiri matokeo ya biashara.

judge_stats.criteria: Mazingira ya simulizi ya biashara ya hisa yanatekelezwa katika `src/env.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/env.py` file does not implement a stock trading simulation environment. Instead, it contains a placeholder `Gridworld` class (a simple grid-based environment with start/end positions) that has no relation to stock trading. The file explicitly lists the requirement as a criterion string but does not fulfill it with actual implementation. There is no stock market data handling, no trading actions (buy/sell/hold), no portfolio management, no price observation space, or any other component expected in a stock trading simulation environment.

judge_stats.criteria: Data ya kihistoria ya soko inatumika kwa mafunzo na majaribio.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/train.py` file is a minimal stub implementation that does not use any historical market data for training or testing. The `train()` function simply iterates over a range of numbers and accumulates a score (`score += step`), with no data loading, no stock price data, no market datasets, and no actual trading simulation. The `save_expected_artifacts()` function only creates placeholder files with the text "generated by minimal semantic train.py" rather than actual results from training on historical data. There is no evidence of any historical market data being loaded, processed, or used anywhere in the project.

judge_stats.criteria: Algoriti ya "Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)" inatekelezwa katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file does not implement the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation" with a trivial training loop (`score += step`) that has no connection to PPO. The file merely lists PPO as a keyword in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and `KEYWORDS` variables, but there is no actual PPO implementation — no policy network, no value function, no clipping objective, no advantage estimation, or any other component characteristic of the PPO algorithm.

judge_stats.criteria: Maamuzi ya biashara yanarekodiwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/trade_decisions.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/trade_decisions.txt` exists in the workspace, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual trade decisions recorded from a PPO trading simulation. This indicates the file was not properly populated with real trading decisions (e.g., buy/sell/hold actions, timestamps, prices, quantities, etc.) generated during the simulation run.

<UNSATISFIED>: Faili `results/metrics/total_profit.txt` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, lakini maudhui yake ni `('placeholder\r\n', None)` - ambayo ni thamani ya placeholder tu, si faida halisi ya jumla iliyohesabiwa kutoka kwa mfumo wa biashara. Hii inaonyesha kwamba faili iliundwa lakini haikujazwa na matokeo ya kweli ya mafunzo/utekelezaji wa PPO. Pia, trajekta haikuonyesha hatua yoyote ya kuandika thamani halisi katika faili hii.
